title: Determine used motor vehicle stock requirements
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Determine used motor vehicle stock requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Gather information to inform decision on used motor vehicle stock requirements

pcs.text: Procedures for collecting relevant data are identified and adopted1.2 Data is obtained from workplace used motor vehicle sales and management staff1.3 Data is collected from workplace used motor vehicle sales history records

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Gather information to inform decision on used motor vehicle stock requirements

elements.title: Determine requirements for selecting used motor vehicle stock

pcs.text: Data is analysed and selection criteria for preferred used motor vehicle stock are established according to workplace requirements2.2 Prices of motor vehicles that meet selection criteria are reviewed and a budget is set for purchasing used motor vehicle stock2.3 List of motor vehicles to be purchased is compiled and documented according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Data is analysed and selection criteria for preferred used motor vehicle stock are established according to workplace requirements2.2 Prices of motor vehicles that meet selection criteria are reviewed and a budget is set for purchasing used motor vehicle stock2.3 List of motor vehicles to be purchased is compiled and documented according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine requirements for selecting used motor vehicle stock

elements.title: Identify sources and providers of required used motor vehicle stock

pcs.text: Workplace data on past used motor vehicle purchases is collected and analysed to determine potential sources and providers of used motor vehicle stock3.2 Additional sources of preferred used motor vehicle stock are researched and analysed3.3 Experienced workplace staff are consulted for sources of preferred used motor vehicle stock3.4 List of sources and providers of motor vehicles to be purchased is compiled and documented according to workplace procedures
